name: Build APK on: push: branches: [ main ] workflow_dispatch: permissions: contents: write jobs: build: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: node-version: 20 - uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: distribution: temurin java-version: 21 - name: Montar assets web (www) run: | rm -rf www && mkdir -p www cp index.html manifest.webmanifest sw.js icon-192.png icon-512.png native-share.js www/ sed -i 's##\n#' www/index.html - name: Instalar Capacitor run: npm install - name: Adicionar plataforma Android run: npx cap add android - name: Sincronizar run: npx cap sync android - name: Compilar APK (debug) run: | cd android chmod +x gradlew ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon - name: Renomear APK run: cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk somar-notas.apk - name: Enviar como artefato do build uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: somar-notas-apk path: somar-notas.apk - name: Publicar em Releases (baixar direto no celular) uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2 with: tag_name: apk-v${{ github.run_number }} name: Somar Notas APK (build ${{ github.run_number }}) files: somar-notas.apk
